title: polypodium squarrosum
intro: Polypodium squarrosum, also known as the rock fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium squarrosum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
